overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rainy, neon-lit Night City. The player moves from a narrow industrial alley onto busy streets, enters a transit station, and traverses an elevated walkway with distinctive bioluminescent walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back alley with makeshift seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow industrial alley, passing people lounging on leather couches and watching holographic TV

notable_agents.action: man with tattoos sitting on leather couch watching holographic TV
two men sitting on couch, one talking on phone and the other looking at device

entered.detail: tall concrete industrial building wall with vents and pipes
dark metal and concrete building facade with graffiti
brown leather couch placed against the wall in the alley
matching brown leather couch on the right side of the alley
futuristic holographic television displaying red interface with text
colorful graffiti art on the distant alley wall
scattered trash bags and cardboard boxes stacked against the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, rain-slicked industrial alley at night. The player walks past makeshift living spaces with leather couches where NPCs lounge and watch holographic TVs. The walls are covered in graffiti and industrial vents, with debris scattered along the concrete ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection under elevated highway

events.description: exits narrow alley onto open street with visible traffic and neon signage
black sedan drives past on the wet street as camera approaches crosswalk

agents.ego_description: turning left onto the sidewalk and walking along the street under the overpass, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the wet street with headlights on
person holding umbrella crossing the street in the rain

entered.detail: yellow textured pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall street lamp casting bright light through the rain
orange neon sign reading 'Calaveras' on distant building
concrete underside of elevated highway or monorail track
entrance to the Night City Area Rapid Transit station with glass doors
row of futuristic vending machines with glowing displays

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the alley onto a rain-soaked urban street beneath an elevated overpass. The scene opens up to reveal traffic, pedestrians with umbrellas, and the glowing 'Calaveras' neon sign in the distance. The camera turns left to follow the sidewalk toward the transit station entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station entrance with turnstiles and vending area

events.description: enters the covered transit station area with NCART signage and turnstiles
begins ascending concrete stairs toward the elevated platform

agents.ego_description: walking into the transit station, passing turnstiles and approaching the stairway to the elevated walkway

notable_agents.action: man kneeling on the ground working on equipment near vending machines
group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the station interior

entered.detail: futuristic turnstile gates with glowing green access lights
wide concrete stairs with yellow safety edges leading upward
large holographic display showing advertisements
illuminated sign reading 'Night City Area Rapid Transit'
moving escalator with glass sides adjacent to the stairs
teal and yellow painted walls with industrial paneling

segments.scene_description: The player enters the NCART transit station, moving from the open street into a covered interior space with turnstiles and holographic advertisements. The environment shifts to teal and yellow interior walls as the camera approaches the stairway and escalator leading to the elevated platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with bioluminescent plant installations

events.description: emerges onto elevated walkway with distinctive pink illuminated plant walls
continues ascending upper stairway toward higher pedestrian level

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated corridor with glowing pink walls, passing other pedestrians and ascending additional stairs

notable_agents.action: tattooed man in pink shirt walking along the corridor
person with umbrella walking toward camera on the elevated walkway

entered.detail: wall of bioluminescent pink and red plants behind glass panels with purple lighting
covered pedestrian bridge with wet concrete floor overlooking the street below
concrete ceiling and walls covered in colorful graffiti tags and murals
second set of stairs leading to upper level with teal railings
view of the street and traffic visible through the walkway openings

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on an elevated pedestrian walkway featuring striking pink bioluminescent plant walls that cast a neon glow on the wet surfaces. The player walks past graffiti-covered walls and other pedestrians while ascending additional stairs, with views of the street traffic visible below through the walkway openings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic industrial alleyway into the expansive, neon-drenched architecture of a futuristic transit hub. It begins by navigating a rain-slicked alley past makeshift living spaces and holographic TVs, moving through a corridor of graffiti and industrial vents. As the camera emerges from the narrow passage, the environment opens onto a rain-soaked urban street beneath an overpass, where the view expands to reveal bustling traffic and the distant glow of a Calaveras neon sign. The scene then shifts from the open street into the covered NCART transit station, transitioning through teal and yellow interiors filled with turnstiles and holographic ads. Finally, the camera ascends toward an elevated pedestrian walkway, where the lighting transforms into a vibrant pink glow cast by bioluminescent plant walls overlooking the city traffic below.
